data.title: LeakSecure® Unveils LeakSecure Pro App to Help Plumbing Pros Install Faster, Reduce Callbacks, and Scale Smarter
data.description: Notation Labs, the company behind LeakSecure®, a comprehensive whole-home water protection system, has introduced a new app tailored for plumbing professionals. This innovative app is specifically designed to streamline installation processes, minimize errors, and eradicate typical challenges faced on worksites. By harnessing technology, the app aims to enhance efficiency and optimize workflow for professionals in the plumbing industry. The app launch was announced from Scottsdale, Arizona, on April 16, 2026. This advancement is set to significantly impact the way plumbing professionals operate, offering them a more efficient and error-free solution.

data.title: Silvercorp Reports Operational Results and Financial Results Release Date for Fiscal 2026, and Issues Fiscal 2027 Production, Cash Cost, and Capital Expenditure Guidance
data.description: Listed as TSX/NYSE American: SVM, Silvercorp Metals Inc. recently disclosed their production and sales data for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2026. The reports encompass the period ending March 31, 2026. This information was made public on April 16, 2026, in Vancouver, BC. Silvercorp Metals Inc., referred to as "Silvercorp" or the "Company," operates under trading symbols TSX: SVM and NYSE American: SVM.

data.title: PickleRage Appoints Rich DeStasio as Chief Executive Officer to Lead Next Phase of Growth
data.description: PickleRage, a top indoor pickleball club franchise, based in Miami, made a major announcement on April 16, 2026, revealing the appointment of Rich DeStasio as their new Chief Executive Officer. This move signifies a crucial milestone in the company's ongoing nationwide expansion efforts and strategic plans for sustainable growth. DeStasio's leadership is expected to drive the brand forward in the coming years, as the company aims to solidify its position in the market.
